com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.PrimitiveBooleanVerifier

Packages that use PrimitiveBooleanVerifier 
Package Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements
The Requirements, DefaultRequirements endpoints.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of core Java types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal
Design guide

  • Uses of PrimitiveBooleanVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements

    Methods in com.github.cowwoc.requirements that return PrimitiveBooleanVerifier 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    static PrimitiveBooleanVerifier DefaultRequirements.assertThat​(boolean actual, String name)
    Same as DefaultRequirements.requireThat(boolean, String) but does nothing if assertions are disabled for this class.
    PrimitiveBooleanVerifier Requirements.assertThat​(boolean actual, String name)
    Same as Requirements.requireThat(boolean, String) but does nothing if assertions are disabled for this class.
    static PrimitiveBooleanVerifier DefaultRequirements.requireThat​(boolean actual, String name)
    Verifies the requirements of a boolean.
    PrimitiveBooleanVerifier Requirements.requireThat​(boolean actual, String name)
    Verifies the requirements of a boolean.

  • Uses of PrimitiveBooleanVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

    Methods in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java that return PrimitiveBooleanVerifier 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    PrimitiveBooleanVerifier JavaRequirements.assertThat​(boolean actual, String name)
    Same as JavaRequirements.requireThat(boolean, String) but does nothing if assertions are disabled for this class.
    PrimitiveBooleanVerifier PrimitiveBooleanVerifier.isNotNull()
    Deprecated.
    the actual value cannot be null
    PrimitiveBooleanVerifier PrimitiveBooleanVerifier.isNull()
    Deprecated.
    the actual value cannot be null
    PrimitiveBooleanVerifier JavaRequirements.requireThat​(boolean actual, String name)
    Verifies the requirements of a boolean.

  • Uses of PrimitiveBooleanVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal

    Classes in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal that implement PrimitiveBooleanVerifier 
    Modifier and Type Class Description
    class  PrimitiveBooleanVerifierImpl
    Default implementation of PrimitiveBooleanVerifier.
    class  PrimitiveBooleanVerifierNoOp
    A PrimitiveBooleanVerifier that does nothing.
    Methods in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal that return PrimitiveBooleanVerifier 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    PrimitiveBooleanVerifier PrimitiveBooleanVerifierImpl.isNotNull()

    PrimitiveBooleanVerifier PrimitiveBooleanVerifierNoOp.isNotNull()
